title: MonoAim Pack
description: This pack enhances PvP visibility for better aim with a grey world and colorful players.
body:
## 🎯 MonoAim PvP Pack

This pack is designed to **enhance PvP visibility and give you better aim** by reducing distractions and highlighting what really matters in combat.
✨ Features

* 🌑 **Grey World Aesthetic** → most blocks and terrain are desaturated for reduced visual noise.
* 🎯 **Better Aim Focus** → players stay colorful so enemies stand out clearly.
* 🟥 **Red Netherite Armor** → instantly recognizable in fights for faster reaction time.
* ⚡ **Optimized for FPS** → lightweight textures that won’t slow your game.
* 📦 **Compatible with Minecraft 1.20+** 

---

## 📸 Screenshots & Media

👉 *Added pack screenshots here when uploading to Modrinth for maximum clarity.*

---

## 📝 Credits

* Pack created and designed by **ThunderDeath**
* Inspired by the idea of combining **minimalism + combat clarity**

---

## 🔑 Keywords

* PvP, FPS Boost, Contrast, Aim, Visibility, Grey Pack, ThunderDeath, Red Netherite, Performance, Minecraft 1.20
* With its **unique contrast design**, the **MonoAim Pack** makes PvP fights sharper, faster, and more fun while keeping the style clean and professional.
